summary: Tested country flag emojis in mini month calendar feature. All features working correctly: Backend returns longWeekends with holidays containing countryCode field, Frontend shows month headers with opportunity counts, tapping month headers expands mini calendar with highlighted days and country flag emojis beneath holiday dates, calendar legend shows Holiday/Weekend/Bridge Day categories, Holidays and Overlaps tabs work correctly (regression).

issues: React Native 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated warning in console (pre-existing, low priority)

critical_code_review_comments: MonthCalendar component correctly uses getCountryFlag() utility to convert country codes to flag emojis
dayFlags Map correctly populated from longWeekends.holidays data with date and countryCode
Calendar highlights holiday dates (orange), weekend dates (light blue), and bridge days (green)
Legend dynamically shows only categories that have dates in the current month view
testID attributes properly set: month-header-{m}, month-calendar-{month}, holidays-stat, overlaps-stat, longweekends-stat
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 tested country flag emojis feature in mini month calendar. Feature works correctly: when Long Weekends tab is selected and a month header is tapped, a mini calendar expands showing highlighted dates. Holiday dates show tiny country flag emojis (8px fontSize) beneath the day number. Flags are computed from the holidays array in each longWeekend which contains countryCode field. Calendar also shows Legend with Holiday/Weekend/Bridge Day categories. All testID selectors working: month-header-{m}, month-calendar-{month}, holidays-stat, overlaps-stat, longweekends-stat. Stats bar shows 29 holidays, 4 overlaps, 18 long weekends for US+DE in 2026.
